name: InspectAgents
description: AI agent testing and safety platform with documented chatbot failures, risk assessment tools, and deployment checklists.

skills.name: Search AI Failures Database
skills.description: Search and filter documented AI chatbot failures by category, severity, year, or free text. Includes incidents from Chevrolet, Air Canada, DPD, Google, and more.

skills.name: AI Risk Assessment
skills.description: Run the AI risk assessment quiz programmatically to evaluate deployment readiness and get personalized recommendations.

skills.name: AI Agent Risk Checklist
skills.description: Retrieve the 67-point AI agent pre-deployment checklist covering hallucination, prompt injection, security, bias, and more.

skills.name: Submit AI Incident Report
skills.description: Submit new AI chatbot failures, corrections, or feedback to the InspectAgents database.

authentication.description: All endpoints are free and require no authentication
